_comment: Gold severities for ex6 task2 (fixtures/triage_records.json). The scratchpad's findings should match these. The point of the exercise is the context pattern, not hard classification — these are deliberately clear-cut. P1=outage/data loss/security, P2=degraded/partial with a workaround, P3=cosmetic/single user/question.

labels.rationale: Login slow for ~15% in one region; still succeeds.
Replica lag; internal reporting stale, no customer impact.
Cosmetic column-order mismatch for 1 account; data correct.
Live secrets exposed in public logs; security.
Emoji-query edge case; rare, no crash.
Worker fleet stalled; queue 50k+ and climbing.
2FA SMS delayed for some; codes still valid, TOTP workaround.
Blurry hero image on retina; cosmetic.
